# Spec — 2026-05-15

## Executive Summary

- **anthropics/claude-code** (v2.1.142): New `claude agents` dispatch flags (`--add-dir`, `--settings`, `--mcp-config`, `--plugin-dir`, `--permission-mode`, `--model`, `--effort`, `--dangerously-skip-permissions`); fast mode defaults to Opus 4.7; reactive compaction seeds initial summarize from overflow size (avoids wasted near-full-context retry); Plugin SKILL.md support; daemon clock-jump detection for macOS sleep/wake; numerous background agent crash-loop fixes
- **anthropics/claude-code** (v2.1.142): Hook configuration validation — prompt/agent-type hooks on `SessionStart`/`Setup`/`SubagentStart` now error with "use a command-type hook instead". This is a guardrail pattern we lack
- **Kilo-Org/kilocode** (~60 commits): Speech-to-text prompt input (VSCode); chunked oversized compactions (`fix(cli): chunk oversized compactions`); collapsible Agent Manager sidebar with persistent state; shell command syntax highlighting via Shiki; diff sidebar with terminals; Agent Manager subagent session hiding
- **cline/cline** (CLI v3.0.3): OpenAI-compatible provider restored; typed model metadata facts; Ollama default-on reasoning disable routing; SDK skill for Claude Code agents; SAP AI Core provider expanded (Opus 4.6/4.7, Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite & Image, Amazon Nova models); kanban command and notice dialog
- **aider-ai/aider**: No new commits in last 7 days
- **continuedev/continue**: No new commits in last 7 days
- **Key new pattern**: Reactive compaction seeding — Claude Code v2.1.142 seeds the first summarize attempt from the original request's overflow size rather than making a blind attempt, avoiding a wasted near-full-context retry. Our compaction has no awareness of the triggering overflow size
- **Key new pattern**: Agent dispatch configuration — `claude agents` now accepts 8+ flags to configure dispatched background sessions (`--model`, `--effort`, `--permission-mode`, etc.). Our agent/task system has no per-dispatch configuration mechanism
- **Key new pattern**: Chunked compaction — Kilo ships `chunk oversized compactions` to split large compaction payloads that exceed model input limits. Our compaction sends the entire payload in one shot regardless of size
- **Gap persists (from yesterday)**: Hook `continueOnBlock` rejection feedback, MCP project directory env var, agent observability headers — still unimplemented
- **Gap persists (from yesterday)**: Configurable auto-compaction threshold — still unimplemented
- **New gap**: Hook type validation per event — Claude Code v2.1.142 validates that prompt/agent hooks cannot be used on SessionStart/Setup/SubagentStart events, requiring command-type hooks instead. Our hook system has no event-type compatibility validation

## What to build (prioritized)

### 1. MCP Project Directory Environment Variable
- **What**: Pass `ALEXI_PROJECT_DIR` (resolved working directory) to MCP stdio server child processes in `src/mcp/client.ts:connectStdio` (line 133 env block)
- **Why**: Claude Code shipped `CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR` in v2.1.139 and it's now referenced across plugins and hooks. Our `connectStdio` builds env from `process.env + config.env` but has no project directory. MCP servers resolving relative paths must hardcode paths today. Single-line change, immediate value for all MCP users
- **Source**: anthropics/claude-code v2.1.139 (persists); Kilo-Org/kilocode already ships this pattern
- **Category**: mcp
- **Size**: small (< 4h)

### 2. Hook Rejection Feedback Loop (continueOnBlock)
- **What**: Add `continueOnBlock` option to PostToolUse hooks — when a hook rejects tool execution (non-zero exit / HTTP error), feed the rejection reason back to the model as an error message so it self-corrects instead of halting
- **Why**: Claude Code v2.1.139-142 has stabilized this pattern with continued fixes. Our hooks (`src/hooks/index.ts`) execute and return `HookResult[]` but the orchestrator doesn't feed rejection back into the conversation. This is the most impactful guardrail pattern for production autonomous agents
- **Source**: anthropics/claude-code v2.1.139 `continueOnBlock`; fixes in v2.1.140-142
- **Category**: config
- **Size**: medium (1-2 days)

### 3. Chunked Compaction for Oversized Payloads
- **What**: When the messages to be compacted exceed the summarization model's input limit, split into chunks and summarize incrementally (or iteratively merge partial summaries). Add `maxChunkTokens` to `CompactionOptions`
- **Why**: Kilo just shipped `fix(cli): chunk oversized compactions`. Our `CompactionManager.compact()` sends the entire old-message block to the summarize function in one call. For very long sessions (100k+ tokens of history), this exceeds model context and fails silently. Chunked compaction ensures summarization always succeeds
- **Source**: Kilo-Org/kilocode commit c1a797c1 "fix(cli): chunk oversized compactions"
- **Category**: core
- **Size**: medium (1-2 days)

### 4. Agent Observability Headers (OTEL Tracing)
- **What**: Inject `x-alexi-agent-id` and `x-alexi-parent-agent-id` headers on LLM API requests from subagents. Extend `src/providers/sessionHeaders.ts` to accept agent identity alongside session affinity
- **Why**: Claude Code v2.1.139 traces all subagent API calls with hierarchy headers and OTEL span attributes. Our session headers track session affinity but not agent identity. Multi-agent debugging requires knowing which agent originated each API call. 3 lines of code change in `buildSessionHeaders`
- **Source**: anthropics/claude-code v2.1.139 — `x-claude-code-agent-id` / `x-claude-code-parent-agent-id` headers
- **Category**: provider
- **Size**: small (< 4h)

### 5. Hook Event-Type Compatibility Validation
- **What**: Add validation that `SessionStart`, `SessionEnd`, and `Error` events only accept `command`-type hooks (not `http` or `script` hooks that may have long timeouts or rely on session state not yet available). Show a clear error at registration time
- **Why**: Claude Code v2.1.142 added clear "use a command-type hook instead" errors for incompatible event/type combinations. Our `HookManagerImpl.register()` validates structure but not semantic compatibility — a script hook on `SessionStart` could deadlock the session startup. Prevents footgun misconfiguration
- **Source**: anthropics/claude-code v2.1.142 — "configuring a prompt- or agent-type hook for SessionStart/Setup/SubagentStart now shows a clear error"
- **Category**: config
- **Size**: small (< 4h)
